name.title: Name
name.description: Friendly display name for this agent.

model.title: Model
model.description: Qualified model override (e.g. openai:gpt-4o). Defaults to global model.

canMessage.title: Can Message
canMessage.description: Agent IDs this agent can talk to. Use * for all.

maxToolRounds.title: Max Tool Rounds
maxToolRounds.description: Maximum tool-call loop iterations per run.

compressionThreshold.title: Compression Threshold
compressionThreshold.description: Context compression triggers when estimated tokens exceed this ratio of the context window (0-1).

minKeepMessages.title: Min Keep Messages
minKeepMessages.description: Minimum number of recent messages to preserve during truncation and compression.

maxToolResultChars.title: Max Tool Result Chars
maxToolResultChars.description: Maximum characters per old tool result before truncation.

maxWorkspaceFileChars.title: Max Workspace File Chars
maxWorkspaceFileChars.description: Maximum characters per workspace file (AGENT.md, MEMORY.md) in the system prompt.

allow.title: Allow
allow.description: Tool names to allow (empty = all allowed).

deny.title: Deny
deny.description: Tool names to deny (deny wins over allow).

allow.title: Allow
allow.description: Skill names to allow (empty = all allowed).

deny.title: Deny
deny.description: Skill names to deny (deny wins over allow).

x-sections.title: Limits
x-sections.description: Runtime limits for the tool loop, context compression, and prompt construction.

x-sections.title: Filters
x-sections.description: Allow/deny lists for tools and skills.
